channel.title: Marketing on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Marketing on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Game Trailers
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about game trailers.

item.title: How To Talk To Press
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk to you about how to talk to press.

item.title: More Thoughts On Game Marketing
item.description: Hi everybody. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to give more thoughts on game marketing and look, I exist in daytime.

item.title: Marketing
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about marketing.

item.title: Player Expectations
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about player expectations.

item.title: Discoverability
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about discoverability.

item.title: Marketing The Outer Worlds
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about marketing and specifically marketing on The Outer Worlds.

item.title: Branding in The Outer Worlds
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about corporate brands in the The Outer Worlds, which I think ties really nicely into yesterday’s video about coming up with names for Fallout.

item.title: How Fallout Got Its Name
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about how Fallout got its name.
